creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've tested with all options disabled and got this error:

===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: lib/saga/libdb_pgsql.so
Error: Missing: lib/saga/libdocs_pdf.so
Error: Missing: lib/saga/libimagery_vigra.so
Error: Missing: share/applications/saga_gui.desktop
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Can you test this, please? Thanks!
